name: nails-and-beauty-co-stress-tests
description: Stress tests, load tests, and concurrent-booking race condition tests for Nails & Co.

scripts.k6:all: k6 run load-test.js && k6 run stress-test.js && k6 run spike-test.js
scripts.stress:all: npm run k6:run && npm run artillery:run && npm run test:concurrent

notes.k6: k6 must be installed separately at the system level. See https://grafana.com/docs/k6/latest/get-started/installation/
notes.k6:windows: winget install k6  or  choco install k6
notes.artillery: Install globally: npm install -g artillery  (not a local dep to avoid AWS SDK version conflicts)
notes.env:BASE_URL: Set BASE_URL env var to point at your backend (default: https://nails-backend.fly.dev)
notes.env:AUTH_TOKEN: If your /api/bookings endpoint requires auth, set AUTH_TOKEN=Bearer <token>
notes.env:TEST_SERVICE_ID: Set TEST_SERVICE_ID to a real service UUID from your DB for concurrent tests
notes.env:TEST_STAFF_ID: Set TEST_STAFF_ID to a real staff member UUID for concurrent tests
